entry.title: Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil With Higher Strength Omega-3
entry.s:type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
Price: 999.00 - 1899.00 (2 variants)

Lead a healthy, happy, and stress-free life knowing that you are continuously shielding your heart, brain, eye, and immunity with our uniquely formulated Omega-3 Gold Capsule.

neuherbs Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil Omega-3 Capsules is a premium supplement in India designed to improve your health with the power of omega-3 fatty acids. It contains concentrated and highly potent Omega-3 fatty acids, Boswellia extract, curcuminoids, and Vitamins D3 and E. Each daily serving (2 capsules) delivers an impressive 1800mg of omega-3, including 1080mg of EPA and 720mg of DHA.

6X Omega-3

Muscle Recovery & Performance

Joint Support

Enhanced Absorption

Molecullarly Distilled

Trusted by 3 million

Why Should You Choose neuherbs’ Omega 3 Gold Fish Oil Capsule?

The Omega-3 fish oil gold is procured from the best quality deep-sea fish, anchovies, and sardines. We use an advanced molecular distillation process that separates, purifies, and concentrates the fish oil at low temperature to remove any heavy metal toxicity, organic contaminants, and other health-damaging ingredients. This advanced molecular distillation removes mercury, copper, and cadmium without losing the oil’s potency and nutrient efficiency.

The EPA and DHA found in Omega 3 Fatty Acids help boost good cholesterol levels and lower bad cholesterol, promoting overall heart health. They can also help reduce triglycerides, improving liver function and toxin removal process. Fatty acid DHA is known for its ability to enhance cognitive health and memory and navigate age-related brain issues like Alzheimer’s and dementia. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties help reduce muscle inflammation caused by injury, improve flexibility, and maintain joint health.

The all-new, unique, lemon-flavoured formula from neuherbs also offers the goodness of Vitamin E and Vitamin D3. They together help manage bone health as you age and protect your skin and hair from oxidative stress.

Omega Gold Capsule Benefits


  • Supports Cardiovascular Health: Regular intake promotes healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure, contributing to overall heart wellness.
  • Improves Joint Flexibility: Infused with Boswellia extract. This supplement aids in reducing inflammation and alleviating joint stiffness, perfect for athletes, sportspersons, and bodybuilders.
  • Boosts Brain Function: Rich in DHA, these capsules support cognitive health, enhancing memory and focus.
  • Strengthens Immune System: The antioxidant properties of omega-3s help combat oxidative stress, promoting a strong immune response to various illnesses.
  • Improves Muscle Recovery: Ideal for post-workout recovery, our omega 3 gold fish oil tablets and capsules with added Vitamin D3 assist in muscle strength and performance optimisation.
  • Natural Lemon Essence: The natural flavour of lemon minimises fishy burps and unpleasant aftertaste commonly associated with other brands’ Omega 3 gold tablets.


Omega 3 Gold capsule benefits don’t end here. The presence of curcuminoids further makes the formula more bioavailable and result-driven.

Quality Trusted by Over 3 Million Consumers in India

At neuherbs, we prioritise quality above all. Our Omega 3 gold fish oils undergo rigorous third-party testing to ensure it is free from heavy metals and contaminants. Furthermore, each batch is evaluated based on ten quality control checks so that you get the best of both worlds – traditional Ayurveda and western science. We adhere to sustainable harvesting practices, ensuring that our fish oil is not only effective but also environmentally friendly.

Dosage and Packaging

neuherbs' omega 3 gold capsules are available in convenient packs of 60 softgels. Simply take one capsule twice daily with meals for optimal results. As a leader in health and wellness supplements in India, neuherbs is committed to providing natural solutions to improve your well-being without side effects or dependency.

entry.title: Pure Himalayan Shilajit Gummies 30 (Tamarind Flavour) for Stamina
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Pure Himalayan Shilajit Resin Gummies
Price: 499.00 - 998.00 (2 variants)

Shilajit is a traditional Ayurvedic herb that has been used for centuries to treat people with low stamina, endurance, and vitality. neuherbs Pure Himalayan Shilajit Gummies are not only powerfully packed with original Himalayan shilajit resin, sourced from the high altitudes of the Himalayas, but are also available in a delicious and effortless gummy format. This new Shilajit resin gummy is recognized as the best gummies for strength, stamina and vitality, and uniquely delivers the benefits of Shilajit; with the added deliciousness of tamarind flavour! Offering all the advantages of pure shilajit resin, neuherbs Shilajit gummies provide a convenient option that can be consumed without water, offering flexibility and ease of consumption. Whether you need an energy boost before a workout or desire a sweet indulgence after a meal, simply chew these gummies anytime, anywhere, for an effortless wellness experience. The shilajit gummies are free from added sugar, artificial preservatives & gelatin free.

entry.title: Shilajit Gold Ultra Capsules to Boost Men's Performance
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Shilajit Gold
Price: 699.00 - 1199.00 (2 variants)

neuherbs Shilajit Ultra Gold Capsule for men, has 11 powerful Ayurvedic ingredients such as && Ashwagandha, Shatavari, Cinnamon, Gokshura, Lavang, Jaiphal, kesar, and Swarna Bhasma. Ayurveda says these ingredients are used as Rasayana, to promote longevity, energy levels and stamina. The herbs have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, rejuvenating properties, helping with endurance, stamina, performance and motivation. Shilajit gold ultra capsules also help in enhancing mood, sleep and reduce stress offering a positive effect on overall testosterone levels. The addition of kali mirch extract also known as piperine ensures that the body absorbs the nutrients present in neuherbs Shilajit Ultra Gold Capsules effectively, making our shilajit capsules one of the most effective in increasing your performance & stamina!

entry.title: Ayurvedic Gokshura Tablet For Men Wellness - Improves Vitality & strength, Helps Boost Testosterone Levels
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Gokshura Tablet
Price: 275.00 - 550.00 (2 variants)

Gokushura or Tribulus terrestris contains the active ingredient saponins and has long been used in Ayurveda as a tonic or rasayana for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties and is known to help maintain hormonal balance in the body. Studies show that Gokshura or Gokshura tablets are used to increase testosterone levels in the body, which can improve strength, endurance, men's personal health, muscle recovery, growth, and overall vitality. neuherbs brings to you its Gokshura Tablets which contain the goodness of high strength gokshura – yielding a 1000 mg intake per serving. neuherbs Gokshura tablets also contain extra support of kali mirch which contains 95% piperine that is known to improve absorption and provide better wellness results to you. When consumed regularly, the natural herbal powder can enhance stamina and endurance, which is beneficial for athletes, bodybuilders, and people who want to gain muscle mass.

entry.title: Organic Safed Musli Powder for men's support of vitality, reduced physical weakness and high performance.
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Safed Musli Powder
Price: 399.00 - 798.00 (2 variants)

Derived from the roots of the Chlorophytum borivilianum plant, neuherbs brings to you its safed musli powder — a supplement known for its benefits for vitality & performance. Safed Musli Powder benefits you by enhancing the vitality of your body, while also helping with energy & body strength. This magical Ayurvedic herb acts as a natural performance booster that helps reduce physical weakness & boost performance. neuherbs Organic Safed Musli Powder for male does not contain added preservatives, artificial colour or flavour to give you authentic Safed Musli powder benefits, making it the best supplement for male wellness.

entry.title: Protein Seeds Mix - Rich in Protein, Dietary Fiber, Magnesium
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Protein Seeds Mix
Price: 199.00

Get your daily protein intake with Protein Seed Mix by neuherbs- a nutritious and delicious high-protein superfood that supports your fitness goals naturally. Protein seeds mix contain a good amount of pumpkin seeds, watermelon seeds, and sunflower seeds. These organically grown seeds are a great plant-based source of protein and dietary fibers. They are also packed with essential vitamins and minerals that our mind & body needs on a daily basis. neuherbs  all-natural protein mix not only provides your body with all the nutrients but also serves as a low-calorie snack that satisfies your food cravings, keeping you satiated for longer. You can use neuherbs  protein seeds mix in a variety of dishes, such as kheer, laddoo, shakes, smoothies, oatmeal, and panjiri. neuherbs  Protein Seeds Mix may not burn fat or build muscles, however, this plant-based protein mix, contains ingredients that possess nutrients and dietary fiber that can support your fitness goals when you do the right exercises and eat a balanced diet.

entry.title: Pure Himalayan Shilajit Resin - Boost Stamina & Strength
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Shilajit
Price: 699.00 - 999.00 (2 variants)

Shilajit is a traditional Ayurvedic herb that has been used for centuries to help people with low stamina, endurance, and vitality. neuherbs shilajit resin is sourced from the high altitudes of the Himalayas for high potency & better results. neuherbs Pure Himalayan Shilajit Resin is purified using a Traditional Ayurvedic technique known as Suryataapi to retain its nutrients, benefits, and effectiveness. So, try neuherbs ’ Pure Himalayan Shilajit Resin and improve your strength, stamina & energy while reducing fatigue and getting your testosterone levels significantly higher. Since it is sourced from high ~18000 ft. altitudes, it offers you up to 75% of fulvic acid and the most potent form for optimal absorption and efficacy. neuherbs Pure Himalayan Shilajit is completely safe as it is tested for heavy metals from NABL.

entry.title: T7 Test-On: Ayurvedic Testosterone Booster for Men
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Ayurveda Muscle Booster
Price: 599.00 - 799.00 (2 variants)

Looking for a vegan, non-addicting form of boosting testosterone? Look no more! neuherbs T7 Test-on — Testosterone boosters bring to you the goodness of eight exotic traditional herbs to boost your testosterone levels and avail associated health benefits. Ayurvedic herbs such as Ashwagandha and Shilajit, Konch Beej help boost testosterone levels, energy and vitality alongside mood, stamina and strength of the individual. Added Piperin helps the body further absorb nutrients present in our ayurvedic testosterone boosters. Ingredients such as Fenugreek seeds, Gokshura, and Mucuna may further reduce inflammation and contribute to post-workout or post-injury muscle recovery along with the development of lean muscle. This ayurvedic testosterone booster helps in building muscle mass and is safe for long term use as it is a certified ayurvedic product.
